extracted_information: Credibility and trust are paramount in cannabis web design due to industry stigma and regulatory challenges. A well-designed website signals professionalism, organization, and commitment to quality, acting as the first impression. Conversely, a poor website (outdated information, broken links, mobile unresponsiveness, slow load times, confusing navigation) damages credibility, creates doubt, and tarnishes reputation. Trust-building elements include strong user experience, adherence to professional standards, and compliance with regulations.

specifications.functionality: No broken links, intuitive navigation, clear calls to action

features: Intuitive and easy to navigate website structure
Adherence to industry standards and guidelines
